title: Library of Congress: Child Labor Primary Sources
description: A LOC source card for child labor photographs, documents, and social reform materials.
license: Library of Congress / item-level rights vary

pages.text: Library of Congress child labor sources include reform photography, documents, and classroom materials that show work conditions and public arguments for change.
Use this source for photo analysis, ethical discussion, historical empathy, and connecting evidence to reform movements and labor law.
Review Library of Congress item pages for rights and reproduction notes before mirroring individual photographs or documents.
